Package org.jbox2d.common

Class Sweep

java.lang.Object
org.jbox2d.common.Sweep
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Sweep extends Object implements Serializable
This describes the motion of a body/shape for TOI computation. Shapes are defined with respect to the body origin, which may not coincide with the center of mass. However, to support dynamics we must interpolate the center of mass position.
Author:
Daniel Murphy

    • getTransform

      public final void getTransform(Transform xf, float beta)
      Get the interpolated transform at a specific time.
      Parameters:
      xf - The result is placed here - must not be null.
      beta - The normalized time in [0,1].
